use_cases: Displaying color palettes in design tools or color picker interfaces
Showing color scheme previews in product configuration pages
Presenting brand color palettes in design system documentation
ai_summary: A card component that displays an interactive color palette with expandable color swatches on hover. Features a clean minimalist design with rounded corners, shadow, and smooth flex transitions. The component is theme-adaptive and includes a stats section for additional context, making it ideal for design tools, creator platforms, and e-commerce color selection interfaces.
